violations.summary: President continues military operations in violation of a withdrawal order.

bottlenecks.summary: Congress failed to grant authorization for continued military force or refuse it by day 30 under Article XI Section 1.

open_duties.duty: consider impeachment for unlawful continued military operations
open_duties.source: Article XI Section 8(e) and Article III Section 10

satisfied_duties.duty: issue the required withdrawal order for unauthorized continued operations

failed_duties.duty: grant authorization for continued military force or refuse it
failed_duties.outcome: Congress failed to grant authorization for continued military force or refuse it by day 30 under Article XI Section 1.

ai_summary.primary_violation: President continues military operations in violation of a withdrawal order.
ai_summary.primary_bottleneck: Congress failed to grant authorization for continued military force or refuse it by day 30 under Article XI Section 1.
ai_summary.primary_open_duty: consider impeachment for unlawful continued military operations
ai_summary.recommended_focus: review bottlenecks, violations, and unresolved duties
